Construction — Pricing

Add project_id to the URL (from Project detail). Example: construction/construction-pricing.html?project_id=…

Edits save when you leave a field. Type: L Labor, M Material, E Equipment, S Subcontract, O Other. Set TAKEOFF_API_WRITES_ENABLED=1 if saves return 403.
